response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and web software developer, but lacks the specialized hardware and AI infrastructure expertise required for this role. The position demands deep knowledge of SoC modeling, GPU architecture, and deep-learning workload optimization, none of which are present in his background.
strengths: Extensive software development experience spanning over 15 years.
Proven track record of system architecture design for high-traffic web microservices.
Strong software craftsmanship practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Complete lack of experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No background in deep neural network training or AI accelerator optimization.
Missing required expertise in SIMD, MIMD, and GPU architectures.
